theme_and_archetype.rationale: A developer-focused API timing dashboard demands a high-contrast, data-dense, technical aesthetic. 'Control Room' density with stark monospace stats and status-driven neon accents.

data_font.usage: All numbers, stats, live clocks, code, table data, chart axes, countdowns.

hierarchy_rules: Data/Stats: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-mono text-zinc-50 tabular-nums tracking-tighter

surface_and_textures.hover_effects: Interactive elements should not have soft shadows; instead, use sharp 1px border highlights or solid color fills.
surface_and_textures.hero_panel: The active zone panel should have a radial gradient background originating from the center (using the active zone's bg_glow) to simulate a radar/terminal glow.

layout_and_spacing.container: min-h-screen bg-[#050505] p-4 md:p-8 text-zinc-100 flex flex-col gap-6

header.description: Minimal top bar bridging application title and live ET clock.
header.styles: flex justify-between items-end border-b border-zinc-800 pb-4. The clock MUST use font-mono tabular-nums to prevent layout shifting.

controls_row.styles: Use raw styling or customized Shadcn Select. rounded-none border-zinc-700 bg-[#0a0a0b] hover:border-zinc-500 transition-colors.

zone_hero_panel.description: Dominant card showing the current zone status and an animated ring SVG.
zone_hero_panel.visuals: Center-aligned. Large status text (OFF-PEAK/MODERATE/PEAK) glowing in its respective color. Wrap this in a circular SVG ring that has a stroke-dasharray animation rotating slowly. The stroke color matches the active zone.

metric_cards.description: 3 cards showing Current ET Time, Next Zone Time, and a text Recommendation.
metric_cards.styles: Strict rectangular borders. Label on top left (text-xs uppercase text-zinc-500). Massive monospace value in center or bottom left.

charts_24h.description: Recharts BarChart representing the 24 hours of the day.
charts_24h.styles: Bars must be colored strictly by their zone configuration (green/amber/red). X-axis: 00:00 to 23:00 ET. Tooltip background MUST be #050505 with border-zinc-800.

weekly_heatmap.description: Grid layout representing 7 days x 24 hours.
weekly_heatmap.styles: Use a grid of small divs (e.g., w-3 h-3 or w-full h-full aspect-square). Apply bg-green-500/80, bg-amber-500/80, bg-red-500/80 based on schedule. Minimal gap (gap-1 or gap-0.5).

model_limits_table.styles: border-collapse. Header text-xs DM Sans text-zinc-500. Rows text-sm Space Mono text-zinc-300. border-b border-zinc-800/50. hover:bg-zinc-900.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for the SVG ring rotation (linear, infinite). The ring should scale up slightly (1.05) on zone change.
motion_and_interactions.toast: Use Sonner for a toast notification when the zone changes. Toast must be dark mode, strictly rectangular, with a border matching the new zone color.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements and data points MUST include `data-testid`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the fonts 'Space Mono' and 'DM Sans' are imported from Google Fonts in index.html or injected via CSS.
Implement the zone logic strictly on the client-side using ET timezone manipulation.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Card padding (p-6). Use p-4 or p-6 but ensure borders are rounded-none and shadows are disabled.
The 24H chart should use Recharts' <BarChart> with custom <Cell> fills matching the zone colors.
The Heatmap is just a CSS Grid (7 rows for days, 24 columns for hours).
No placeholder images are required for this purely UI/data-driven app.
